funding.note: 2M+ commercial deliveries. Expanding to Houston, Phoenix.
Drone-based inventory intelligence for warehouses.
Drone-delivered defibrillators. Active in Sweden, expanding Europe.
Paris-based. Real-time drone surveillance for borders/infrastructure. Led by AlleyCorp.
Canadian. Autonomous Arctic drone systems.
$24M Series A (2019), $15M+ Army SBIR. Seeking Series B. Himax strategic investment 2024.
Lockheed Martin strategic partner. IDF + USSOCOM deployed.

NATO Innovation Fund backed. 783 employees. 10,000+ combat flight hours in Ukraine. £3B+ Russian assets destroyed (inc. 2x S-400). EMSA €30M contract. £400M OVERMATCH UK investment. Acquired West Wales Airport. Investors: Ventura Capital, Baillie Gifford, NATO IF, NSSIF, Crescent Cove, Iberis.
India's largest military drone maker. Public on BSE/NSE.
Graduated to Toronto Stock Exchange. Trading as FLT.

~$300M revenue FY2025. 1,200+ employees. Hivemind AI pilot on F-16, MQ-20, V-BAT. X-BAT VTOL fighter jet unveiled Oct 2025. CEO Gary Steele (ex-Splunk/Cisco). Offices: SD, Dallas, DC, Abu Dhabi, Kyiv, Melbourne. Indian Army V-BAT deal Jan 2026. JSW Defence $90M India manufacturing. Coast Guard $198M IDIQ.
Blue UAS listed. US-made. X10 enterprise drone.
Acquired 3 rivals in 6 months. Reverse merger via Aureus Greenway (Nasdaq). Supplying DoD attack drones.
Total raised $30.5M. 16K+ FAA-certified pilots. Led by Kevin O'Leary's Wonder Fund.
3M+ sites. Progress AI, Safety AI, Inspection AI. Autonomous ground robots beta 2026.
3.6M autonomous deliveries. Expanding to 5 Indian metros. Physical AI stack.
Most recent funded competitor in drone racing/swarm space.
Army JIATF-401. Lattice C2 backbone. First task order $87M. Founded by Palmer Luckey.
European C-UAS. Sentinel system expansion.
Autonomous surface vessels. Port Alpha shipyard ($300M Louisiana investment). 3 vessels: Spyglass (6ft), Cutlass (14ft), Corsair (24ft), Marauder (150ft). Founded 2022, Austin TX. 350+ employees.
Open-source robotics visualization and observability. ROS2 compatible. Alternative to RViz. Used by drone/robot developers.
Centimeter-accurate positioning. Polaris RTK correction network. Drone/AV/robotics applications.
Autonomous vehicle simulation platform. Defense + commercial. Used for drone autonomy testing.
General-purpose humanoid robot. Physical AI foundation model. OpenAI partnership.

First Replicator 2 contract (Jan 2026). DroneHunter 5.0 shipping. SkyDome C2. Only company authorized for drone-on-drone kinetic intercept in US. G-TEAD marketplace. Power grid protection (Southern States LLC). Europe + Middle East orders (Oct 2025). HQ: Lindon, Utah.

~$17-20M revenue. 260% growth. Acquired Teal Drones + FlightWave Aerospace. Teal 2 / Black Widow won Army SRR program. FANG F7 mil-spec FPV. Blue UAS listed. Founded 2016, pivoted to defense-first via Teal acquisition.
Helix mesh radio on Blue UAS Framework. Compact form factor. NDAA compliant. Competes with Silvus ($4.4B acq by Motorola) and Persistent Systems. Canadian HQ.
Three platforms: Tempest 50, El Niño, Squall. Group 2 ISR/strike gap between FPV and Switchblade. ArduPilot/QGC based. Targeting Replicator-adjacent procurement.
Lucid Bots Raises $20M to Scale Autonomous Exterior Cleaning Drone Platform
Total raised: $121M. Investors include Peter Thiel. Sanctioned by China.
Valuation $600M+. Rheinmetall stakeholder. Near $100M revenue.
Total: ~$59.5M. Seed $12.5M from Lockheed Martin Ventures.
With Sequoia, Lightspeed, Shield Capital, Point72.
Total Series B: $70M. Total raised: ~$102M.
Includes $35M from Ondas Holdings (Nov 2025). Total $145M+.
Manna Raises $50M to Expand Drone Delivery Network in the U.S.
FY2025 revenue $7.73M (+18% YoY). Q1 2025: $1.547M (+16% YoY). 25+ year history. Founded 1998 Saskatoon, SK. CEO Cameron Chell.

contracts.note: DroneHunter F700 AI interceptor. Delivery by April 2026.
Through 2030. Research, prototyping, production.
11 states hosting 2026 FIFA World Cup matches.
18 C-UAS batteries + Polish industrial investment.
Competitive 3-year procurement. Frontline recon.
Z1 hydrogen-powered UAS. Redstone Arsenal contracting.
Fixed-wing mapping drones sold to US Army.
Asia-Pacific military deployment.
SXGA microbolometer development. Palomar 2 ROIC.
French Army tactical drone system.
35+ export countries. Poland $350M order.
India, Germany, Azerbaijan, South Korea, Singapore.
Lattice software as C2 backbone for counter-drone. Visited Kyiv to study Ukraine drone defense.
1,700 drop-glide munitions + 24 weaponized UAS. HKR system. SBIR Phase III.
APFIT total now >$1B to small businesses. Marine Corps >$160M across 6.5 projects.
MDA doubled SHIELD awardees. Counter-UAS tied to Golden Dome integrated defense.
Corsair autonomous surface vessel production. Prototype to production in <1 year. 'War-footing speed.'
Arsenal-1 megafactory for autonomous systems mass production.
V-BAT 5.3 — 100% KPPs during July 2025 operational testing.
V-BATs + Hivemind SDK for sovereign autonomy development.
India V-BAT production facility. $65M first year.
Hivemind selected for Collaborative Combat Aircraft. Anduril Fury airframe.
AR5 UAS. 2yr + 2yr extension. Two full systems.
UK production, R&D hubs, 1000+ jobs. AR3/AR5 sovereign production.
European and Middle Eastern allies.
Among first defense companies selected.
DroneHunter protecting power grid.
Black Widow won Short-Range Reconnaissance program.
Validates mesh radio market. Doodle Labs positioned as compact alternative.

contracts.note: Joint framework for Asia-Pacific defense modernization, maritime/border security, disaster response. Commander 3XL as ISR platform.

contracts.program: Palladyne AI SwarmOS Integration — Autonomous Swarm
contracts.note: SwarmOS DECA architecture validated via flight simulation on Draganfly hardware. Targets contested GPS-denied environments. Decentralized edge autonomy, no continuous comms required.

Missing-person recoveries, wilderness rescues, police missions. Joint flight testing and validation completed prior to announcement.
Repeat order from Fortune 50 telecom customer. NDAA-compliant system deployment.

grants_awards.program: FCC Covered List Update
grants_awards.note: First conditional approvals for drone systems. Foreign-made UAS on restricted list.

grants_awards.program: SAFER SKIES Act (FY2026 NDAA)
grants_awards.note: Expands domestic C-UAS authority. Federal standards for detection/mitigation.

grants_awards.program: NHTSA PAEB Mandate
grants_awards.note: Pedestrian AEB required on all new cars. Drives thermal sensor demand (Obsidian, FLIR).

grants_awards.program: NLC + BRINC DFR Initiative

grants_awards.program: FCC Foreign UAS Covered List
grants_awards.note: All foreign-made UAS + critical components added to FCC Covered List. Cannot receive new equipment authorization. Effectively bans import of Chinese drones.

grants_awards.program: JIATF-401 Establishment
grants_awards.note: SecDef Hegseth ordered Army to stand up Joint Interagency Task Force 401 for counter-drone. Brig. Gen. Matt Ross directing.

commercial_sources.note: Physical AI 50 list. Top-tier defense/robotics investor. Portfolio: Anduril, Saronic, Shield AI.

market_stats.key_trend: Defense dominates. 77% of 2025 funding = defense. FCC ban reshaping supply chains. Counter-UAS is fastest growing segment.
market_stats.source: Drone Industry Insights, GrowthList, DRONELIFE, The Drone Girl

program.name: Drone Dominance Program (DDP)
program.sponsor: Office of the Secretary of War
executors: Naval Surface Warfare Center, Crane Division (NSWC Crane)
program.mandate: Unit prices decrease, production volumes increase, operational capability rises across phases
program.phase_3_4_requirement: More than one-to-one relationship between drone and operators (swarm control mandatory)

invited.name: Auterion Government Solutions Inc.
invited.note: AI-enabled guidance systems; European tech roots

invited.name: DZYNE Technologies, LLC
invited.note: Also makes the only DoD-authorized handheld jammer

invited.name: Kratos SRE, Inc.
invited.note: Subsidiary of larger defense firm; XQ-58A Valkyrie heritage

invited.name: ModalAI, Inc.
invited.note: VOXL 2 companion computer; Blue UAS certified

invited.name: Performance Drone Works LLC
invited.note: C100 on Blue UAS list; Blackwave radio for USSOCOM

invited.name: Swarm Defense Technologies, LLC
invited.note: 8 years manufacturing; 20,000+ units built; deconfliction algorithm for thousands of drones

invited.name: Teal Drones Inc.
invited.note: Red Cat Holdings subsidiary; Golden Eagle/Black Widow; Blue UAS

invited.name: XTEND Reality Inc.
invited.note: XOS integrated into Lockheed Skunk Works MDCX C2 platform

winners.name: Skycutter
winners.note: British startup; stunned US defense establishment; highest score by wide margin

winners.name: ModalAI
winners.note: VOXL 2 autonomy stack; Blue UAS; already in SRR program

winners.name: Auterion
winners.note: PX4-based open architecture; enterprise fleet management

winners.name: Nokturnal AI
winners.note: AI-focused; not in original 25 invite list — may have entered via alternate path or name change

winners.name: Ascent Aerosystems
winners.note: HELIUS nano-UAV; coaxial rotor specialist; Blue UAS

notable_non_advancing: Teal Drones (Red Cat) — Blue UAS incumbent, did not advance
XTEND Reality — despite Lockheed MDCX integration
Performance Drone Works — Blue UAS C100, USSOCOM Blackwave
Kratos SRE — invited but not listed in winners or non-advancing (unclear status)
analysis.key_supplier: Doodle Labs radio modules confirmed in at least 7 entrants
analysis.surprise_winner: Skycutter (UK) scored 99.3 — 12 points above #2; British startup beat entire US defense industrial base
analysis.compliance_requirement: All winners must pass NDAA/Blue UAS compliance verification by DCMA before contract award

skycutter.manufacturing: 3D-printed with AI QC, CNC machining, UK factory
skycutter.combat_experience: SkyFall drones widely used in Ukraine since 2022

neros.key_product: Archer 8-inch FPV (2-3 lbs, 20+ km, 160 km/h, 2 kg payload)
neros.combat_experience: Thousands shipped to Ukraine. USMC actively fielding. Army PBAS ahead of schedule.

napatree.combat_experience: 1,000+ combat flights vs Russian targets (Bumblebee). 1,900+ drone intercepts (MEROPS).

modalai.manufacturing: All hand-built in San Diego. PCB in Carlsbad/Santa Ana, CA.

auterion.key_product: Skynode + AuterionOS + Nemyx swarm strike engine

udd.supply_chain: Fully localized: carbon frames, antennas, FCs, ESCs, radios, video TX all domestic
udd.combat_experience: F7 recognized as 'most effective weapon on front lines' by Army of Drones

nokturnal_ai.note: Extremely secretive. Connected to OKSI Ventures. Selected for DIU Project G.I.

parents: By Light Professional IT Services (1,000+ employees)
halo_aeronautics.facility: 88,000 sq ft with indoor flight test range

ascent.key_product: Spirit coaxial UAV (60+ mph, 30+ miles, 53 min, dual Blue UAS status)

farage.note: Most opaque company in competition. Specific platform not publicly identified.

supply_chain_analysis.doodle_labs_integration: Confirmed in 7+ entrants. Helix Mesh Rider Radio is 'Blue UAS datalink of choice'. 200K+ radio capacity/year.
supply_chain_analysis.fiber_optic_trend: Top scorer (Skycutter) and 2 other entrants (Neros, Vector Defense) used fiber-optic control — inherently EW-immune.
supply_chain_analysis.phase_2_chinese_ban: Phase II (Aug 2026) bans Chinese motors and batteries. ~5 months for winners to find alternatives.
supply_chain_analysis.phase_4_endstate: 150,000 drones at $2,300/unit from 5 final winners by Jan 2028

gauntlet_details.mission_1: Long-distance strike: stationary target at 10 km, individual then multi-UAV. 10 UAVs expended. Skycutter ranked 1st.
gauntlet_details.mission_2: Urban strike: search-and-destroy within ~3 miles. Indoor strike included. Neros ranked 1st.
gauntlet_details.mission_3: Kinetic strike (optional): live ammo test by vendor pilots for bonus points.
gauntlet_details.order_allocation: 1st place: up to 2,500 units. 11th place: 1,500 units.
gauntlet_details.delivery_terms: 50% within 2.5 months, remainder 75 days later. Early bonuses, late penalties.

phase_4.name: Gauntlet IV
phase_4.note: Final phase; hundreds of thousands of units; target completion Jan 2028
